titleStmt.title: SII 9.46: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 46. (A.R. No. 343 of 1920.) ON A STONE BY THE SIDE OF THE ISVARA TEMPLE AT PEDDAVADUGURU, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is not dated; it belongs to the reign of the Chālukya king Satyāśraya whose proper name appears to be Eṟeyitiyaḍigaḷ. It registers the grant of the village Eḻpattu Siṁbhige, made tax-free, by Eṟetiyaḍigaḷ after his subdugation of Raṇavikrama, probably a Bāṇa king. It also registers the grant of the village Nāḍanūru, with the consent of the Bāṇa king. The engraver Mahēndrapallavāchāri was granted 12 mattars of land at Nāḍanūru by the Mahājanas. If Eṟeyatiyaḍigaḷ stands for Eṟeya which was a name of Pulakēsin II this record may have to be assigned to the reign of that king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . satyāśraya śrīpṛthuvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
śvarabhaṭārara datti nāḍanoroḷraṇavikramanānneṟetiyaḍigā
ḷḷeḻpattusiṁbhige koḷgoḷaduḷvīḻe Eṟidu geldu Alli mahā
janamānkaredu nigaḷa bāḻvantu jīvitaṁ bēḍikoḷḷimendoḍe Āme
lla prasādapaṭṭa Ī Ūranna sarvvabādhāparihāramāge prasādaṁgeyi
Ā mārggame koṭṭār Antosale bāṇarājara viṣayada AgrahāraṁgaḷanteṟeThe letter ya is engraved below the line.
ponvēḍikoṇḍu nāḍanūrā mahājanamānkaredu nīmu nimagappaṁdi hari
yamendu bēḍidoḍe gōḷimaḍuvarasāntappa Ā Ūra sarvvapādaparihā
ramappantu Eṟeyitiyaḍigaḷprasādaṁgeyta pūrvāvatārabāṇarājaṅge
ṇyāraṁ vinnappaṁgeydoḍe Aḍigaḷā prasādaṁgeydante salgendar
lakṣara prasādaṁ geydārācandratārakaṁ . svadettaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasundha
ṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . Ī śilā śāsanaṁ ba
2) The letter zA is written below the line.

dā mahēndrapallavācārige mahājanaṁ Ippatteḻcamuṁ nāḍanūruḷpanni
ttarkkeyyānprasādaṁgeydoṁ Emma sandāyana hitaka dāta .
Digital edition of SII 9.46 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
